[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: A close-up selfie shows a smiling person with one hand raised toward their head, with large bold text reading “DUH LE” across the lower portion of the image.

Main Subject:
A person with dark eyebrows and short dark hair is shown from the upper chest up, smiling with teeth visible and one arm raised over the top of their head as if adjusting or holding their hair or head position. Their face fills most of the frame, and their gaze appears directed toward the camera.

Setting:
The background appears to be indoors or under a roofed area, with a bright light source creating strong illumination and some overexposure. Behind the person, there are indistinct structural elements and what looks like a vehicle or equipment-like shapes in the distance; exact details are unclear.

Visual Details:
The lighting is bright and slightly harsh, with a soft blur around the edges. The person’s skin tone appears medium-brown under the lighting. The large text in the foreground is white with a thick black outline, set in bold block letters, spanning nearly the full width of the image at the bottom.

Visible Text:
DUH LE

Practical Summary:
The image is a close-up of a smiling person holding their hand up near their head. Large bold lettering reading “DUH LE” appears over the bottom part of the photo.

Pertanyaan asli user: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.
